categories.label: Conflict Victories
categories.description: VP earned from winning Conflicts (1st place rewards)

categories.label: Battle Icon Pairs
categories.description: 1 VP per matched pair of battle icons on won Conflict cards and Objectives

categories.label: Faction Influence
categories.description: 1 VP for each faction where you reached level 2 or higher

categories.label: Alliance Tokens
categories.description: 1 VP per Alliance token held at game end

categories.label: The Spice Must Flow
categories.description: 1 VP per The Spice Must Flow card purchased

categories.label: Endgame Intrigue Cards
categories.description: VP from Endgame Intrigue cards played after the final round

categories.label: Other VP
categories.description: VP from card effects, Control bonuses, or other sources
